creator: ssot@mail.ru
text:
After update mysql-client55 to version 5.5.8_1, stopped working databases/mytop utility. All depends update to current version:
mysql-client-5.5.8_1
mysql-server-5.5.8_1
p5-DBD-mysql-4.017
p5-DBI-1.615
p5-Term-ReadKey-2.30

After downgrade mysql-client to version 5.4 all work fine.

How-To-Repeat: # mytop
Segmentation fault: 11 (core dumped)
# ls
perl.core
